page.content: In the context of Freeport-McMoRan's ongoing commitment to enhancing operational efficiency and maximizing resource extraction, the following table outlines key milestones associated with our current capital projects. As we navigate through the complex landscape of the mining and metals sector, it is imperative to maintain a clear overview of project timelines and financial allocations.

complex landscape of the mining and metals sector, it is imperative to maintain a clear overview of project timelines and

page.content: The projects detailed herein, such as Project A and Project B, are critical components of our growth strategy, with budgets of GBP 250 million and GBP 150 million, respectively. Notably, Project A is currently in Phase 1 and is projected to reach 80% completion by June 30, 2025, reflecting our proactive approach to project management and delivery. Conversely, Project B, now entering Phase 2, is scheduled for completion by September 15, 2025. These milestones not only signify our financial investment but are also indicative of our strategic prioritization, allowing us to align resources effectively and mitigate potential risks. The successful execution of these projects is vital for sustaining our competitive edge in the European market, and we remain committed to transparency and accountability in our operational endeavors.
